description: Evaluate the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) of P-waves for the 2024 Noto earthquake using SeisComP. Process the waveform archive located at /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive to determine picks and amplitudes. Export a CSV file to /home/ga/snr_report.csv containing the Station Code, Phase, and SNR for each P-wave. The CSV must include a header row with columns in this exact order: STATION,PHASE,SNR.
